name: Freezer Mix Lentil Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water to loosen.
2. In a Dutch oven, heat the frozen mix, water, lentils, parsley, and bay leaf until boiling.
3. Reduce the heat and cover. Simmer, stirring frequently, until the mixture is thawed, about 20 minutes.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Return to boiling.
5. Reduce the heat and cover. Simmer until the vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
6. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
